title: Automatic Medicine Dispenser
description: A microcontroller-based device that automates medication management by dispensing accurate doses at scheduled times. It includes temperature monitoring, caregiver notifications, and LED guidance for ease of use.

title: Learning Management System
description: Developed a Learning Management System (LMS) for the Mahapola Port & Maritime Academy to replace its manual system. Built the Administrator and Student Dashboards with features for course management, lecturer/student assignment, and attendance tracking.

title: Personal Contact Book
description: A simple yet comprehensive web application built with Spring Boot for managing personal contacts. Demonstrates Spring Boot concepts including MVC architecture, JPA data persistence, Thymeleaf templating, RESTful endpoints, Dockerized deployment, pagination and responsive web design.

title: Restaurant Management System
description: Developing a comprehensive restaurant management system to digitize core restaurant operations including menu management, order processing, and user authentication.
